abilities.description: CARDNAME deals X damage to any target. If a creature dealt damage this way would die this turn, exile it instead.

replacements.description: Hellbent — If you have no cards in hand, this spell can't be countered and the damage can't be prevented.

statics.description: Hellbent — If you have no cards in hand, this spell can't be countered and the damage can't be prevented.
